## Summary

<!-- Brief description of the changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality
      to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure / CI change

## Domain Impact

<!-- Which domain(s) does this change affect? -->

- [ ] Identity
- [ ] Knowledge
- [ ] Narrative
- [ ] Publication
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] Motion
- [ ] Engineering
- [ ] Evolution
- [ ] Shared / Infrastructure

## Architecture Compliance Checklist

- [ ] No architecture violations
- [ ] No DDD violations (aggregates, entities, value objects correctly applied)
- [ ] No dependency violations (respecting DDM dependency direction)
- [ ] No circular dependencies introduced
- [ ] Canonical terminology used (per CTD)
- [ ] Domain ownership respected (per DOM)
- [ ] Semantic contracts maintained
- [ ] CQRS pattern respected (commands vs queries)
- [ ] Event sourcing invariants preserved

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Architecture tests pass
- [ ] All existing tests pass

## Quality Gates

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
